posts.author: AChapman (Ashley Chapman)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi all!

Question 1:
I am curious if there is a way to set an automation ( in a subitems list ) to notify the person assigned to a dependent task when the first task in the dependency line is completed?

For example:

Task one no dependencies
Task two dependent on task one
Task three dependent on task two and so on and so on

I would like to automatically notify the owner of task two when task one is marked completed.

Question 2:
I would also like to ask if there is a way to create automations specific to groups in a board?
All help is appreciated!

posts.author: g.kyriatzis (George Kyriatzis)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,
Did you ever get a reply on this?

posts.author: AChapman (Ashley Chapman)
posts.cookedHtml: I did not. Thank you for checking in.
